item.title: Embattled top US vaccine official Vinay Prasad to step down
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
He was criticised by scientists and former health officials over decisions related to health policy.
Matched: policy(+3), ai(+3), vaccine(+3)

item.title: One week into Iran war, the dangers for the US and Trump multiply
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Mr Trump’s biggest foreign policy gamble could also hurt his Republican Party politically.
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US Treasury secretary hints at lifting more Russian oil sanctions amid price surges following Mid-East war
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The development comes after oil tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has virtually halted.
Matched: war(+3), sanctions(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Israel and Iran exchange fire, Pezeshkian apologises to neighbours
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
BEIRUT/WASHINGTON/JERUSALEM, March 7 - Israel and Iran traded attacks on Saturday as the war entered its second week, while Tehran issued an apology to neighbouring states for its \"actions\", in an apparent bid to ease regional anger at Iranian strikes on Gulf Arab civilian targets.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Panic at Pakistan fuel stations over Iran war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Long queues formed at fuel stations in Pakistan ahead of a government announcement to raise prices.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Malaysia detains 6 locals aged 16 to 21 in Islamic State-linked extremism probe; warns of more arrests
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
Arrested in February across several states, the youths were part of messaging groups that discussed plans to target police stations, government installations and places of worship in Malaysia, said the police chief in revealing the arrests on Friday (Mar 6).
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Explosion heard over Dubai airport amid Mid-East conflict, authorities confirm ‘minor incident’
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Limited flights have resumed from Dubai's main airport since the war began.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: As war spreads, airline pilots contend with drones, missiles – and stress
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
A video footage on March 5 showed planes taking off from Beirut airport as smoke billowed Lebanon.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Gold stuck in Dubai is being sold at discount as war widens
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Upended transport in the Middle East has hampered suppliers' ability to move bullions.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Vibes war? Trump pitches Iran conflict on ‘feeling’
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The US president has prioritised impulse and emotion over explanations and reasoning.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iran war is latest threat to a global economy rattled by Trump
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Rising energy prices threaten to stoke inflation and hobble economic growth in countries around the world.
Matched: war(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2)

item.title: Iran vows no surrender to US, Israel as air strikes hit Tehran airport
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The announcement came as Iran continued to launch attacks in the region on March 7.
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Hezbollah, Israeli troops clash on the ground in eastern Lebanon’s Bekaa
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Lebanese Health Ministry says at least 16 people killed, 35 wounded in Israeli air raids on the town of Nabi Chit.
Matched: ministry(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Russia hits Ukraine with drones, missiles, kills at least seven in Kharkiv
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
KYIV, March 7 - Russia launched a barrage of drones and missiles at Ukraine overnight on Saturday, killing at least seven people, including two children, in the northeast city of Kharkiv, Ukrainian officials said.
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Iranian missiles intercepted over Saudi Arabia, Qatar, UAE, Bahrain sirens
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Qatar says it came under a wave of drone attacks, with 10 fired from Iran, nine intercepted.
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day eight of US-Israel attacks?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
At least 1,332 people have been reported killed in US-Israeli attacks on Iran since launch of war on February 28.
Matched: war(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Hezbollah says confronted Israeli helicopter landing in east Lebanon
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The Lebanese Health Ministry said at least 16 people have been killed in strikes in the area.
Matched: ministry(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Prabowo’s proposed trip to Iran hinges on acceptance of mediation offer by all parties: Foreign ministry
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
A minister in Prabowo Subianto’s Cabinet said separately that the president has received the backing from several Middle Eastern and other Islamic countries for the undertaking.
Matched: ministry(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Questions over AI capability as tech guides Iran strikes
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
AI’s deployment in war poses a slew of moral and legal questions.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Israel fires new wave of 'broad-scale' strikes on Tehran, hitting airport, as war enters second week
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
US Central Command says more than 3,000 Iranian targets have been struck over the past week.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US 'not concerned' by reports Russia aiding Iran's targeting
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
The Washington Post, citing officials familiar with the intelligence, said Russia has provided Iran with the locations of US military assets, including ships and aircraft.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US suspects China in breach of FBI surveillance network, WSJ reports
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The FBI described the hackers’ techniques as “sophisticated”.
Matched: ai(+3), breach(+3)

item.title: US pump prices surge as Iran war upends global energy supply
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Fuel prices in the US jumped more than 10 per cent since the US-Israel war on Iran started.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Britain 'ready to support' Saudi defence: PM Starmer
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
Saudi Arabia - a longstanding rival of Iran - reported that it had intercepted a cruise missile and three drones on Friday.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)
